channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world

item.title: US to give antipersonnel mines to Ukraine to help slow the Russian advance
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — The Biden administration announced Wednesday that it will give Ukraine antipersonnel mines to help it slow Russia’s battlefield advances, marking the second major shift on U.S. military support for Kyiv in days.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, ILLIA NOVIKOV, MATTHEW LEE and LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Yaks, bears and cockatoos are among the animals Russia is sending to North Korean zoo
item.description: Russia has sent a gift of more than 70 animals to North Korea for the Pyongyang Zoo, including bears, yaks, ducks and cockatoos.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Archbishop of Canterbury will end official duties in early January amid sex abuse scandal
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Archbishop of Canterbury Justin Welby, spiritual leader of the global Anglican Communion, will wrap up his official duties in early January amid an abuse scandal in the Church of England, his office said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: US vetoes UN resolution demanding Gaza cease-fire
item.description: The U.S. on Wednesday voted against a United Nations Security Council resolution that demanded an immediate cease-fire in Gaza, citing the lack of a path for releasing hostages held by Hamas as the reason. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: Brad Dress, The Hill

item.title: Pope approves new papal funeral rites to simplify ritual, allow for burial outside the Vatican
item.description: ROME (AP) — Pope Francis has revised the funeral rites that will be used when he dies, simplifying the rituals to emphasize his role as a mere bishop and allowing for burial outside the Vatican in keeping with his wishes.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Economists expect Trump to place huge tariffs on Chinese imports: Survey
item.description: Economists are expecting President-elect Trump to place tariffs of about 40 percent on Chinese imports, according to a survey from Reuters. In the survey of economists, 45 percent said the “level of tariffs imposed by Trump on Chinese goods” will be between 31 percent and 45 percent.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: US vetoes UN resolution demanding a cease-fire in Gaza because there's no link to a hostage release
item.description: The United States has vetoed a U.N. Security Council resolution demanding an immediate cease-fire in the war in Gaza because it was not linked to an immediate release of hostages taken captive by Hamas last year.
item.dc:creator: Edith M. Lederer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Pope to make late Italian teenager Carlo Acutis the first millennial saint on April 27
item.description: ROME (AP) — Pope Francis said he will canonize Carlo Acutis next April, setting the eagerly awaited date for the late teenager to become the Catholic Church’s first millennial and digital-era saint.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Liam Payne's One Direction bandmates among the mourners at singer's funeral
item.description: The former members of One Direction have reunited for the funeral of bandmate Liam Payne, who died in a fall from a hotel window in Argentina on Oct. 16.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: US Embassy in Ukraine warns of 'significant air attack,' closes
item.description: The U.S. Embassy in Kyiv sounded the alarm on a "potential significant air attack" Wednesday, announcing that it will close. The warning also recommended American citizens in the area to prepare to shelter in place.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: Hong Kong ex-publisher Jimmy Lai testifies he didn't ask Pence, Pompeo to take action against city
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Former Hong Kong publisher Jimmy Lai denied in his landmark national security trial on Wednesday he had asked then U.S.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Argentina's Milei pivots to pragmatism in first talks with China's Xi after shaking up the G20
item.description: LA PAZ, Boliva (AP) — Last year, then-presidential candidate Javier Milei declared Argentina would not “make deals with communists” in China or Brazil, calling their leaders “murderers” and “thieves” in a bid to channel the populist energies of Donald Trump and other global far-right icons into a wi
item.dc:creator: ISABEL DEBRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Middle East latest: US envoy holds talks in Lebanon on Israel-Hezbollah cease-fire proposal
item.description: U.S. envoy Amos Hochstein held what he called “very constructive talks” with Lebanese officials in Beirut on Tuesday about a possible cease-fire in the Israel-Hezbollah war.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Foreign governments criticize Hong Kong's sentencing of 45 activists. Beijing defends it
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Forty-five prominent activists in Hong Kong were sentenced to jail for up to 10 years on Tuesday, sparking criticism from foreign governments and rights groups. Beijing defended the decisions.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sweden, Finland and Norway release new advice on surviving war amid concerns over Russia, Ukraine escalation
item.description: Sweden, Finland and Norway this week released detailed guidance for citizens on how to survive a crisis situation like extreme weather or war-like conditions that could hamper food or internet access.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ukraine fires several US-made longer-range missiles into Russia for the first time
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine fired several American-supplied longer-range missiles into Russia, officials said Tuesday, marking the first time Kyiv used the weapons that way in 1,000 days of war.
item.dc:creator: HANNA ARHIROVA and ILLIA NOVIKOV, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: 1,000 days of war in Ukraine as Zelenskyy doubles down on aerial options with ATACMS, drones and missiles
item.description: Ukraine marks 1,000 days of war with Russia on Tuesday as President Zelenskyy eyes plan to develop thousands of long-range drones and military targets inside Russia using US-supplied ATACMS.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: World's hottest calendar drops 2025 edition, proceeds going to Hurricane Helene, Milton efforts
item.description: This year, the funds collected from calendar sales will support those impacted by Hurricanes Helene and Milton, to provide immediate relief and aid to impacted communities.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Biden's Ukraine missile move will have 'some impact': Retired major
item.description: Lyons questioned the timing of the decision, saying, “I’m not sure why we didn’t allow this two or three years ago.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, The Hill

item.title: 45 pro-democracy Hong Kong activists sentenced to up to 10 years in prison under China-backed law
item.description: Western countries are outraged after Hong Kong used a Chinese national security law to sentence 45 pro-democracy activists to up to 10 years in prison.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cruz says UN draft resolution against Israel is aimed at undermining incoming Trump admin, GOP Congress
item.description: In the closing weeks of the Biden administration, there are new concerns in Israel and among supporters of the Jewish state that the Biden administration will seek to punish Israel at the United Nations.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bolton: Moscow, Beijing should feel ‘a lot of relief’ if Gabbard is confirmed as DNI
item.description: Former national security adviser John Bolton said that Russia and China should feel “a lot of relief” if former Rep. Tulsi Gabbard (Hawaii) is confirmed as President-elect Trump’s choice for director of national intelligence. “She’s not capable of doing it,” Bolton said Sunday on CNN.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Israeli strike kills Hezbollah spokesman in Beirut; at least 30 dead in Gaza airstrikes
item.description: A rare Israeli strike in central Beirut has killed the chief spokesman for the Hezbollah militant group. It was the latest in targeted killings of senior Hezbollah officials.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Russia launches one of its fiercest missile and drone attacks at Ukraine's infrastructure
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — A Russian strike on a nine-story building in the city of Sumy in northern Ukraine killed eight people and wounded dozens, an official said Sunday, as Russia launched a massive drone and missile attack described by officials as the largest in recent months.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB and JOANNA KOZLOWSKA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Cruise line offers 4-year cruise to 'skip forward,' in wake of U.S. election results
item.description: One cruise line is offering travelers a customized journey for up to four years, to "skip forward," in the wake of the recent presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Australian zoo asks citizens to catch deadly spiders
item.description: Despite the zany ask, there is a valiant reason behind the call from The Australian Reptile Park in Sydney, New South Wales.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: Wreckage of World War II warship found 80 years later
item.description: The USS Edsall, a World War II American warship, was bombed and sank three months after the attack on Pearl Harbor.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: VIDEO: Severe flight turbulence on Florida-bound flight sends person airborne, requires plane inspection
item.description: A Miami-bound flight turned frightening after the plane experienced severe turbulence, causing a diversion and requiring inspection of the plane.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 10 newborn babies die in India after fire rips through hospital neonatal unit
item.description: Ten newborn babies were killed in northern India after a fire swept through a neonatal intensive care unit on Friday; 38 newborns were reportedly rescued from the ward.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alex Soros, Jared Kushner reportedly obsessed with Albania
item.description: Alex Soros, whose father is Hungarian, reportedly travels to the capital Tirana so often he has called it “my second home.
item.dc:creator: Paula Froelich, NewsNation
